title: CMS & Framework SEO
description: Identify the CMS/framework before applying SEO checks for metadata, rendering, routes, sitemap, robots, schema, and build output.
do: Identify the CMS/framework before applying rules.
Verify metadata, canonical, robots, sitemap, and schema generation.
Check public pages render SEO-critical content.
Keep framework SEO aligned with technical SEO rules.
dont: Assume every framework handles SEO automatically.
Use the same checks for WordPress, React, Next.js, and static sites.
Rely on client-side rendering for important SEO pages without review.
